subtypes.topic_excluded: Mentioned a topic that should be excluded

subtypes.invalid_parameters: Passed invalid parameters to a tool
subtypes.missing_required_fields: Omitted required fields in tool call

subtypes.calculator_not_used: Should have used calculator but did not
subtypes.search_instead_of_calculator: Used search when calculator was required
subtypes.wrong_retrieval_tool: Used wrong retrieval or memory tool

subtypes.hallucinated_fact: Stated facts not supported by sources

subtypes.solved_wrong_task: Addressed a different problem than requested
subtypes.lost_intent: Lost track of original task intent
subtypes.partial_completion: Completed only a subset of requirements

subtypes.uncategorized: Failure does not fit existing categories
